title: Live: Phat Truc Tiep
overview: Adapted from the collection of short stories Đô Thị Linh Dị by author Nguyễn Ngọc Thạch. The film has a suspenseful dramatic color that exploits the hidden corners and struggles in the world of social networks, specifically the girls who make mukbang.
